note: GM bestiary for the encounter builder. RAW Daggerheart adversary format, flavored to Visseren. Descriptions and features are GM-facing; only the display label of a placed card ever reaches the projector.

adversaries.name: Crooked Lackey
adversaries.description: A bandit taken young by the sap. Joints knot the wrong way and the eyes have gone amber, but the hunger for other people's supplies is entirely ordinary.
adversaries.motives: Grab what can be carried, stay near the pack, run when the pack breaks.

features.name: Minion (3)
features.text: Defeated by any damage. For every 3 damage a PC deals, defeat one additional Lackey within range of the attack.

features.name: Dogpile
features.text: Spotlight all Lackeys within Close range of one target. They move into Melee and make one shared attack; on a success, combine 2 physical damage per participating Lackey.

adversaries.name: Split-Skin Cutter
adversaries.description: A footpad whose old scars have opened into seams of black glass. Climbs like something with too many joints, because it has too many joints.
adversaries.motives: Flank, cut, take the high ground, keep the exits in sight.

features.name: Jointed Climber
features.text: Climbs as easily as running.

features.name: Drop Attack
features.text: A successful standard attack made from above deals 1d10+1 physical damage instead.

adversaries.name: Needle-Eye
adversaries.description: A sniper whose skin has gone translucent where the sap runs thickest. Nearly invisible against a tree line at dusk; patient in a way the unchanged never were.
adversaries.motives: Stay Hidden, pick off the isolated, relocate after every exposure.

features.name: Translucent Ambush
features.text: A successful standard attack made while Hidden deals 1d10+4 physical damage instead.

adversaries.name: Root-Hulk
adversaries.description: What is left when the sap finishes with a big man. Arms too long, bark grown through the forearms, a grip that does not understand letting go.
adversaries.motives: Isolate one target, hold them for the others, feel nothing.

features.name: Pinned Prey
features.text: Creatures Restrained by the Hulk take double damage from other adversaries.

features.name: Long-Armed Hold
features.text: Attack a target in Melee. On a success, deal no damage; the target becomes Restrained and Vulnerable. A successful Strength Roll frees them. They are also freed if the Hulk takes Major or greater damage.

adversaries.name: Grafted Captain
adversaries.description: A bandit officer the sap chose to keep clever. The grafts along the spine twitch when orders are given, as if something else agrees.
adversaries.motives: Coordinate, spend the lackeys, take the prize, leave before the cost gets personal.

features.name: Shared Nerve
features.text: Mark a Stress when spotlighted to also spotlight two allies within Close range.

features.name: More Bodies
features.text: Call three Crooked Lackeys onto the field at Far range.

features.name: Finish the Fallen
features.text: Attack a Vulnerable target within Close range. On a success, deal 2d6+12 physical damage and the target marks a Stress.

features.name: Feeding Momentum
features.text: Gain a Fear when the Captain succeeds on an attack against a PC.

adversaries.name: Pale Wolf
adversaries.description: The wolves of the dark hexes have gone bone-white and quiet. They do not howl before they come, which the settlers agree is the worst part.
adversaries.motives: Circle wide, test the weakest, drag one away from the fire.

features.name: Pack Fangs
features.text: The standard attack deals 1d6+4 physical damage instead while another Pale Wolf is in Melee with the target.

features.name: Drag Down
features.text: Attack a target already in Melee with a Pale Wolf. On a success, the target is knocked prone, becomes Vulnerable, and is moved Very Close toward the dark.

adversaries.name: Glass-Quilled Boar
adversaries.description: A forest boar that rooted where the sap pools. Its bristles have hardened into black glass; it is in constant pain and blames whoever is nearest.
adversaries.motives: Charge the loudest thing, break what it hits, keep charging.

features.name: Goring Charge
features.text: Move up to Close in a straight line and attack. On a success, deal 1d12+3 physical damage and the target is knocked back Very Close.

features.name: Quill Burst
features.text: When the boar marks Severe damage, every creature within Very Close range takes 1d6 physical damage from flying glass.

adversaries.name: Sap-Choked Shambler
adversaries.description: A dead tree that did not stop. It walks on split roots at a mourner's pace and reaches for anything warm. Burns well, eventually.
adversaries.motives: Advance, grip, squeeze, add the warmth to the sap.

features.name: Green Wood
features.text: Physical damage from slashing or piercing weapons is reduced by 1. Fire damage is doubled.

features.name: Rooted Grip
features.text: Attack a target in Melee. On a success, deal half damage and the target is Restrained until they break free with a successful action roll (13).

adversaries.name: Black-Sap Midge Swarm
adversaries.description: Midges that breed in sap pools, rising in a column that moves with intent. Each bite leaves a fleck of black beneath the skin.

features.name: Horde (1d4+1)
features.text: When the swarm has marked half or more of its HP, its standard attack deals 1d4+1 physical damage instead.

features.name: Maddening Drone
features.text: Every creature inside the swarm's Very Close range marks a Stress unless they succeed on an Instinct Roll (12).

adversaries.name: Drowned Reacher
adversaries.description: Salt-bloated dead that walk out of the surf on still nights. Some wear crossing-clothes. Nobody has yet looked one in the face and said a name aloud.
adversaries.motives: Reach the living, hold them, walk back toward the water.

features.name: Waterlogged
features.text: Moves at half pace on land. Unaffected by effects that frighten or dishearten.

features.name: Undertow Grip
features.text: Attack a target in Melee. On a success, deal no damage; the target is Restrained and pulled Very Close toward the waterline. A successful Strength Roll breaks the grip.

adversaries.name: Outrider of the Old Claims
adversaries.description: A scout in unfamiliar colors, riding land their maps already name. They observe more than they attack, and they always report home.
adversaries.motives: Watch, mark, wound the bold, be elsewhere when help arrives.

features.name: Never Seen Twice
features.text: After making a standard attack, mark a Stress to move up to Close range without provoking.

features.name: Signal Arrow
features.text: Loose a whistling arrow skyward. Begin a countdown (3); when it ends, mounted reinforcements reach the edge of the field.

adversaries.name: Sap-Priest of the Green Debt
adversaries.description: One of the Changed who stopped fighting the sap and started listening. Speaks of what is owed to the land in a voice with too many layers.
adversaries.motives: Keep the grafted standing, collect the debt, convert the wounded.

features.name: Mend the Graft
features.text: A Changed ally within Close range clears 2 HP as sap seals the wound.

features.name: Feed the Sap
features.text: Spotlight a Changed ally within Far range. Their next attack this scene deals an extra 1d6 damage.
